0101.title: REGIONAL VICTIM WITNESS LIAISON OFFICER APPOINTMENT

quotes.text: COMMCICOM, COMMARFORRES, and Regional MCI Commanding Generals (CGs). Regional MCI CGs are responsible for ensuring that VWAP is properly implemented at each installation within their region. COMMCICOM is responsible for the VWAP in the National Capital Region. COMMARFORRES is responsible for the VWAP in the Marine Reserve. COMMCICOM, COMMARFORRES, and regional MCI CGs shall each appoint in writing a Regional Victim Witness Liaison Officer (RVWLO), by name, title, duty address, and telephone number.
The RVWLO shall be an officer or civilian employee of appropriate grade, experience, and maturity sourced from the supporting LSSS.

regulatory.summary: COMMCICOM, COMMARFORRES, and each regional MCI CG must appoint a Regional VWLO in writing including name, title, duty address, and telephone number. The RVWLO is sourced from the supporting LSSS. Inspector Note: Apply this question only at the regional MCI CG, COMMCICOM, or COMMARFORRES level. Mark N/A for inspections below regional level.

howToInspect.step: Determine If Inspection Is At The Required Level
actions: Confirm the inspected command is COMMCICOM, COMMARFORRES, or a regional MCI command.
If not, mark N/A and move to Q0102.

0104.title: LOCAL VICTIM AND WITNESS ASSISTANCE COUNCIL

quotes.text: Establish a local Victim and Witness Assistance Council, chaired by the installation VWLO, to coordinate a comprehensive assistance program and ensure compliance with VWAP notification and reporting requirements.

regulatory.summary: Installation commanders must establish a local Victim and Witness Assistance Council chaired by the installation VWLO. The Council coordinates the comprehensive VWAP program and ensures compliance with notification and reporting requirements. Inspector Note: Per definitions in MCO 5800.16 V-16, par 0411, the Council should include the Installation VWLO, tenant unit VWACs, and representatives from SAPR, FAP, NCIS, CID, PMO, the installation SJA Office, legal assistance office, chaplaincy, the confinement facility/brig, and other offices deemed appropriate. The Council meets quarterly.

Confirm the Council coordinates VWAP program activities.
Confirm the Council reviews compliance with notification and reporting requirements.

quotes.text: Ensure that the total number of victims and witnesses provided a DD Form 2701 is reported to the Installation VWLO on a quarterly basis.

regulatory.summary: The unit VWAC must report the total number of DD Form 2701s issued to victims and witnesses to the installation VWLO each quarter.

howToInspect.step: Request The Last Four Quarterly Reports
actions: Pull the unit submissions to the installation VWLO for each of the last four quarters.

quotes.text: Where a victim or witness has requested notifications concerning accused in pretrial confinement, the VWAC shall coordinate with LSST VWAC, confinement facility, and trial counsel to effectuate pretrial confinement status notifications.

regulatory.summary: Where a victim or witness has elected notification, the unit VWAC must coordinate with the LSST VWAC, confinement facility, and trial counsel to deliver pretrial confinement status notifications.

0906.title: ANNUAL TRAINING ATTENDANCE LIST

quotes.text: The VWAC shall obtain and distribute VWAP materials and provide annual VWAP training to the members of the command.

regulatory.summary: The unit VWAC must maintain an attendance list for the annual VWAP training to substantiate the requirement that members of the command received training. Inspector Note: MCO 5800.16 V-16 par 040902(D)(8) requires annual VWAP training to be provided to the command but does not specify the form of attendance documentation. The checklist treats a unit attendance roster as the verifying artifact.

actions: Pull the attendance roster for the most recent annual VWAP training session.
howToInspect.callout: No attendance roster for annual training

actions: Confirm name, grade, and unit captured for each attendee.
Confirm date of training captured.
Compare attendance count to the unit personnel roster.
Identify personnel not trained.
No attendance roster maintained.

Significant share of unit not on roster.

questionsToAsk: How do you capture attendance?

verification: Attendance roster on file.

Coverage reflects unit personnel roster.

0907.title: LIAISON WITH MARINE AND FAMILY PROGRAMS

quotes.text: Coordinate with the Marine and Family Programs to ensure the victim or witness receives, when appropriate, information concerning the availability of resources, including information on compensation programs available to victims of intra-familial abuse offenses when the offender is a Service member.

regulatory.summary: When the victim or witness is a member of the unit, the unit VWAC must coordinate with Marine and Family Programs to ensure delivery of resource and compensation program information, including compensation for intra-familial abuse offenses where the offender is a Service member.
